title: The Human-AI Teammate Interaction Loop
description: A diagram illustrating the cyclical, collaborative workflow between a human operator and a remote tele-bot, emphasizing shared goals, communication, and mutual adaptation.
relationships: Human Operator directs the Tele-Bot through an Interface; the Tele-Bot performs tasks and gathers data in the Remote Environment; the Interface provides real-time sensory feedback and AI-generated context to the Human Operator, creating a closed loop for collaborative decision-making and action.
